channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [剧场版][CAST] Anime News Network 2026 Anpanman Film Casts Kenjirō Tsuda
item.description: Tsuda plays film's key character Nyakkuru as his 1st role in franchise ― The staff for Soreike! Anpanman: Pantan to Yakusoku no Hoshi (Pantan and the Promised Star), the 37th film in the franchise,... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 2026 Anpanman Film Casts Kenjirō Tsuda

item.title: [动画][开播][续作] Anime News Network 动画 Expo Hosts World 开播 From Old Country Bumpkin Master Swordsman 季度 2
item.description: Panel to host director Kazumi Akio, producer Hino Ryo ― NBCUniversal Entertainment Japan revealed on Monday that this year's Anime Expo event will host the world premiere of the second anime season... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Anime Expo Hosts World Premiere of From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman Season 2

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Discotek Release Digimon Tamers, Hana Yori Dango 动画 on Blu-ray Disc
item.description: Also: Kamen Rider: Skyrider, Journey to Japan: The Kyoto Connection ― Discotek announced on Monday that it will release the following on Blu-ray Disc: Digimon Season 3 (Digimon Tamers) anime Hana... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Discotek to Release Digimon Tamers, Hana Yori Dango Anime on Blu-ray Disc

item.title: [动画][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Witch Hat Atelier 动画 公开 2 More 声优阵容 Members
item.description: Series casts Ryūsei Nakao as Sasaran, Hiiro Ishibashi as Euini ― The staff for the television anime of Kamome Shirahama's Witch Hat Atelier manga announced two additional cast members on Monday. They... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Witch Hat Atelier Anime Reveals 2 More Cast Members

item.title: [剧场版] MyAnimeList Paradox Live 动画 Gets Movie
item.description: The Paradox Live Dope Show 2026 event announced an anime movie for the franchise on Sunday. The movie will be produced by Studio Graph77, featuring 29 characters from 9 teams, including those who... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Paradox Live The Animation' Gets Movie
